title: Material references for Xiaomi’s success in plastic mobile phones
contentHtml:
Photo courtesy of Saudi Basic Innovative Plastics.


He is regarded as the "Jobs of China", so will plastic mobile phones give Lei Jun's Xiaomi mobile phones a hint of the halo of Apple mobile phones?
He was wearing a black polo shirt and jeans instead of a black turtleneck. The feet are wearing Converse, not New Balance. But the image has been carefully retouched. Xiaomi CEO Lei Jun aspires to become China’s Steve Jobs. Xiaomi, which he founded in Beijing less than four years ago, now has more than 3,000 employees and had revenue of 6.25 billion euros ($8.6 billion) in 2013. The company adopts a direct sales model, and its mobile phones are only sold in Xiaomi "experience" stores and official websites.
Since the company released its first mobile phone, Mi-One, in December 2011, its mobile phone series has become popular in the Chinese market. The company has now added network disk and smart TV businesses.
Xiaomi uses "beautiful and confident plastic", to borrow what Apple's design director Jonathan Ive said when the iPhone 5c was launched, and also uses the same design on the Xiaomi Mi2A mobile phone. The ultra-thin phone comes in a range of bright yet familiar colors (but note that the Mi2A came out months before and was more popular than the iPhone 5c, which was considered a major failure by Apple fans.)
To achieve the desired effect, Xiaomi partnered with Saudi Basic Innovative Plastics, a polymer manufacturer based in Saudi Arabia, to use its polycarbonate-grade Thermocomp LDS and Lexan EXL materials. Why does Xiaomi specifically choose these materials?
Matt Gray, Sabic’s consumer electronics marketing director, said that the three Sabic materials chosen for Xiaomi’s model are all based on polycarbonate. However, each resin and composite material is specially formulated with additives and fillers using Sabic's proprietary process to achieve the ideal performance expected from Xiaomi phones.
Thermocomp DX10311, a fiberglass-reinforced polycarbonate, was used for the internal frame because it delivers the balance of mechanical properties required by the customer, such as stiffness and strength, as well as good impact resistance. Thermocomp DX10311 composites can also increase the yield of non-conductive vacuum plating and painting of mobile phone surfaces, two processes commonly used in the production of device frames.
To maintain the Mi2A's slim shape, its antenna is integrated into the chassis. This requires the use of a complex high-end production process known as laser direct structuring (LDS) to integrate electronic and mechanical functions into a single part.
Sabic has specially developed composite materials as candidate materials for LDS process applications, which can help improve design flexibility and achieve spatial merging, ultimately helping device manufacturers reduce the depth of mobile phones to less than 10 mm to meet the industry trend of thinner and lighter products.
The glossy "timeless plastic" back cover is molded from Lexan EXL1414 resin. Gray said: "Lexan EXL1414 copolymer resin is a medium-flow opaque injection molding grade material. It is used for battery covers/mobile phone back covers because the material can bring many rich color choices, allowing manufacturers to design attractive and colorful mobile phone cases to meet consumer demand."
The material has other important advantages, he said, such as low-temperature ductility (down to -40°C) and chemical resistance. The material also has shorter injection molding cycle times than standard PC resin.
Xiaomi Mi2A mobile phone was launched in China in May 2013. The phone has not yet officially entered the European market, but parallel imports can already be purchased from online stores.
titleZh: 小米塑料手机成功的材料借鉴
contentHtmlZh:
沙特基础创新塑料供图。


　　他被视为"中国的乔布斯"，那么塑料手机是否会让雷军的小米手机也沾上苹果手机的一丝光环呢？
他穿着一件黑色的polo衫，牛仔裤，而不是黑色高领衫。脚上穿的是匡威，而不是新百伦。但形象精心修饰过。小米公司的CEO雷军立志成为中国的乔布斯。他在不到四年前在北京创办的小米公司现在已有了3000多名员工，2013年营收额达到62.5亿欧元（86亿美元）。该公司采用直销模式，其手机只在小米"体验"店和官网上销售。
　　该公司自从2011年12月发布第一款手机Mi-One后，其手机系列在中国市场大行其道，该公司现在又新增了网盘和智能电视机业务。
　　小米采用了"美观且自信满满的塑料"，借用苹果公司的设计总监Jonathan Ive在iPhone 5c上市时说的这句话，在小米Mi2A手机上也采用了同样的设计。这款超薄手机采用了一系列明快而又似曾相似的颜色（但要注意的是，Mi2A比iPhone 5c要早几个月上市，且比后者更受市场欢迎，iPhone 5c则 被苹果粉们视为一大败笔。）
　　为了达到想要的效果，小米与位于沙特阿拉伯的聚合物生产商沙特基础创新塑料公司合作，选用其聚碳酸酯级Thermocomp LDS和Lexan EXL材料。为什么小米要特别选用这些材料呢？
　　Sabic公司的消费电子市场总监Matt Gray介绍说，选择用于小米该型号的三种Sabic材料都是基于聚碳酸酯的。但是，每种树脂和复合材料都经过特殊配制，加入了添加剂和填充物，使用了Sabic的专有工艺，以达到小米手机预期的理想性能。
　　Thermocomp DX10311 是一种玻纤增强聚碳酸酯，被用于内部机架，因其能达到客户要求的平衡的机械性能，比如刚度和强度，以及良好的抗冲性。Thermocomp DX10311复合材料还可以提高手机表面非导电真空电镀和喷漆的产率，这两种工艺通常用在设备框架的生产中。
　　为了保持Mi2A纤巧的形状，其天线被集成到机架中。这需要用到复杂的高端生产工艺，即激光直接结构化（LDS），以便将电子和机械功能集成到单个零件中。
　　Sabic专门开发了复合材料，作为LDS工艺应用的候选材料，可帮助提高设计灵活性和实现空间合并，最终能帮助设备生产商把手机的深度减少至不到10毫米，满足薄型化、更轻巧的行业趋势。
　　亮泽的"永不落伍的塑料"后盖采用Lexan EXL1414树脂模塑而成。Gray说道："Lexan EXL1414共聚物树脂是一种介质流向不透明注塑级材料。它被用于电池盖／手机后盖，因为该材料可带来众多丰富的色彩选择，让生产厂家可以设计出漂亮吸引人的多彩手机外壳，满足消费者的需求。"
　　他说，该材料还有其他重要的优点，比如低温延性（低至-40°C）和耐化学性。相比标准PC树脂，该材料的注塑循环时间也更短。
　　Xiaomi Mi2A手机在2013年5月在中国上市。该手机目前还未正式进入欧洲市场，但已经可以从网店买到水货。
